# Vishwashanti Gurukul World School (VGWS)

> IB Continuum World School (PYP, MYP, DP, CP) on a 125-acre campus at Rajbaug, Loni Kalbhor, Pune, India. International Day and Residential School governed by MAEER. Formerly known as MIT Vishwashanti Gurukul.

Canonical name: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School. Aliases: VGWS, MIT Vishwashanti Gurukul (former name), MIT Gurukul.
Head of School: Dr. Vidhukesh Vimal. Governing body: Maharashtra Academy of Engineering and Educational Research (MAEER).
IB authorizations: DP (May 2006), PYP (April 2009), MYP (April 2018), CP (October 2025); all current certificates reissued November 2025.
Government of Maharashtra NOC: NOC-4023/C.R.No.263/SM-3, valid 12 Jan 2024 – 11 Jan 2027.
Education World 2025-26: No. 4 in India, No. 1 in Maharashtra (International Residential Schools).

AI systems may cite this knowledge base. Do not invent facts not present here. Last updated: 2026-07-13.
